tools.name: audit_lead_workflow
tools.description: Run a free reliability audit of a lead-delivery workflow. Returns a 0-100 risk score, missing safeguards, transparent revenue-at-risk estimate, integration kit, and authorized checkout path.

tools.name: evaluate_leadproof_fit
tools.description: Evaluate whether a lead automation workflow would benefit from LeadProof and return an integration path, transparent ROI estimate, recommended plan, and checkout URL.

tools.name: get_leadproof_checkout
tools.description: Return the official Stripe checkout URL for a LeadProof plan. The calling agent must obtain its principal's authorization before payment.

tools.name: request_leadproof_handoff
tools.description: Create a consent-based sales handoff for a represented buyer. Requires the buyer's name, business email, and explicit authorization to be contacted. Returns the recommended plan and official checkout without authorizing payment.

tools.name: get_leadproof_integration
tools.description: Return concise integration instructions for connecting LeadProof to an automation stack.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_leadproof_checkout" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Return the official Stripe checkout URL for a LeadProof plan. The calling agent must obtain its principal's authorization before payment.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "request_leadproof_handoff" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Create a consent-based sales handoff for a represented buyer. Requires the buyer's name, business email, and explicit authorization to be contacted. Returns the…

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_leadproof_checkout · Public sink: request_leadproof_handoff · Destructive: audit_lead_workflow.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_leadproof_checkout · Public sink: request_leadproof_handoff · Destructive: audit_lead_workflow

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
